title: Google India Search
subtitle: Reimagining search for India's evolving digital landscape.
problem_statement: Users seek more localized, context-aware, and vernacular search experiences beyond basic queries.

pillars.title: Cultural Nuance
pillars.insight: Indian users value local context and vernacular content.

pillars.title: Information Overload
pillars.insight: Users struggle to filter irrelevant global results.

pillars.title: Speed & Access
pillars.insight: Slow internet and diverse devices demand efficiency.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: HMW make search more intuitive for diverse Indian users?
HMW help users find hyper-local, vernacular content easily?
HMW integrate local services and language seamlessly?

personas.name: Rohan Sharma
personas.quote: I need quick, relevant local business info.
personas.bio: Seeks efficient local business solutions, often on mobile, for his shop.

personas.name: Priya Singh
personas.quote: Finding specific study materials in Hindi is hard.
personas.bio: Navigates academic and daily life, needs quick, accurate info in local languages.

insights: Where can I find a good dosa near me?
How do I say this in Hindi?
Wish I could search by voice easily.

points.action: Replace global trending topics with hyper-local Indian trends.
Integrate local service directories directly into search results.
Adapt voice search to understand diverse Indian languages and dialects.
Modify search result snippets to highlight local relevance and language.

pivot.before: Generic global search results often overwhelm Indian users with irrelevant information.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from a global-first to a hyper-local, vernacular-first search paradigm for India.
pivot.after: Personalized, context-aware search results delivered in preferred local languages.

screens.title: Low-Fi
layout: Search Bar (with language toggle, voice icon)
Search Buttons (Google Search, I'm Feeling Lucky)

annotations.title: Language Toggle
annotations.rationale: Allows quick switching between English and local Indian languages.

annotations.title: Local Trends
annotations.rationale: Displays trending topics relevant to the user's region in India.

annotations.title: Voice Input
annotations.rationale: Enhanced voice recognition for diverse Indian accents and languages.

data.finding: Language options not prominent on homepage.
Search results format consistent, but local results vary.
Multiple search methods available (text, voice, image).
